result.stdout:
Description:
  Clean resources used by roughly interrupted IntegrationMocks.

Usage:
  IntegrationMocks.Cleaner [options]

Options:
  -p, --port-number-repository-directory <port-number-repository-directory>  Port number repository directory if not default. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-integrationmocks.cleaner-3.0.1-17d093b2f79f4cd6b5dfaa9293009e8c/xdg-config/IntegrationMocks_PortManager]
  --version                                                                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                             Show help and usage information
